title: OFFICIAL TITAN 4 MOD
description: This Project adds new ores, giant weapons, and powerful armor to Minecraft. Become stronger than ever with Titan gear and Diamond Apples!
body:
# 🗡️ The Titan Mod

The Titan Mod brings power, speed, and new progression to Minecraft!
Inspired by the original Minecraft Titan Project, this mod adds new ores, armor, and massive weapons — all built to make combat faster and more exciting.

## ⚒️ Features

1. 🪓 New Materials: Mine Titan, Citrine, and Nether ores deep underground. Use their ingots to forge some of the strongest tools and weapons in the game.

2. ⚔️ Massive Weapons: Create giant Greatswords made from Titan, Citrine, Diamond, or Nether materials — with no hit cooldown! Swing as fast as you can for nonstop action.

3. 🛡️ Powerful Armor: Equip Titan Armor or Citrine Armor to gain extra defense, health, and resistance.

4. 🍎 Craftable Diamond Apples: You can craft Diamond Apples, which grant stronger absorption effects (but no strength boost) — perfect for surviving deadly fights.

5. 🏹 Extra Gear: Use special items like the Titan Bow, Iron and Diamond Furnaces, and other tools to enhance your gameplay and exploration.

6. ⚖️ Smooth Progression: Designed to feel rewarding while keeping Minecraft’s classic balance and atmosphere intact.


## 🔥 Purpose

The goal of The Titan Mod is to make Minecraft combat faster, smoother, and more satisfying — without losing the vanilla feel.
Collect rare ores, forge massive weapons, and experience true Titan-level power as you fight through the world.

## ⚙️ Compatibility

1. 🧩 Requires Minecraft Forge 1.12.2

2. 💎 Works in both survival and creative mode

3. ⚔️ Hit cooldown removed for all weapons

4. 🧱 Compatible with most exploration and combat mods
